Trial Profile: CONSORT Flow Diagram

Ibraheem Saqib Ellahi

2026-07-10

library(tidyverse)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.5_helpers.R"), local = TRUE)

# Load data (headers/values whitespace-scrubbed) and validate YAML params.
# All layout + drawing lives in viz_consort_flow() (2_R/2.6_viz_functions.R).
raw_data <- cerp_load(params$data_path)
cerp_validate(raw_data, params[grepl("_var$", names(params))])

# Size fig.height below from the number of stages actually present.
n_stages <- dplyr::n_distinct(stringr::str_squish(as.character(raw_data[[params$stage_var]])))
source(here::here("2_R", "2.0_setup_theme.R"), local = TRUE)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.6_viz_functions.R"), local = TRUE)

# Thin wrapper: map the YAML params into viz_consort_flow() and print the ggplot.
viz_consort_flow(
  data           = raw_data,
  stage_var      = params$stage_var,
  n_var          = params$n_var,
  arm_var        = params$arm_var,
  note_var       = params$note_var,
  metric_name    = params$metric_name,
  chart_title    = params$chart_title,
  chart_subtitle = params$chart_subtitle,
  source_note    = params$source_note
)
